disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Progressive dysphagia over ~4 months, starting with solids and now, over 48 hours, extending to liquids and even water
trigger_question_examples: How long have you had trouble swallowing?
Is it worse with solids, liquids, or both now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started about four months ago and only with solid food. In the last day or two it's got so bad that even water won't go down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Marked unintentional weight loss (~15 kg) with cachexia and profound weakness
trigger_question_examples: Have you lost weight without trying?
How much weight have you lost?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've lost a huge amount of weight without trying — my clothes are hanging off me and I'm too weak to get out of bed.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Coughing, choking and hoarseness on attempting to swallow liquids — aspiration on swallowing
trigger_question_examples: Do you cough or choke when you try to drink?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The second I try to sip anything I cough and splutter and it comes back up, and my voice has gone hoarse.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Painful swallowing (odynophagia) with burning behind the breastbone, and regurgitation of foul-smelling undigested food
trigger_question_examples: Does it hurt when you swallow?
Does food come back up after you eat?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It burns terribly behind my breastbone when anything goes down, and a while later I bring up foul-smelling, undigested food.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Complete inability to maintain oral hydration or nutrition — imminent dehydration and malnutrition
trigger_question_examples: Are you able to keep any fluids down?
When did you last manage to drink something?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can't keep anything down at all now — not food, not even water. Nothing has stayed down for a couple of days.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Background of many years of heavy smoking and long-standing GORD self-treated with antacids (risk-factor context; potential benign anchor)
trigger_question_examples: Do you smoke, and for how long?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've smoked heavily for years and had reflux and heartburn for a long time. I've been taking antacids but they do nothing now.
